title: Indulgent Polish Oreo Cream Biscuits Bake
description: A rich and decadent Polish-inspired dessert featuring Oreo cream biscuits in a velvety mother sauce base, accessible for dairy-free diets.

ingredients.name: Oreo cream biscuits
ingredients.notes: any brand or type of Oreo cream biscuits will work

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: dairy-free alternative or regular unsalted butter

ingredients.name: dark chocolate chips
ingredients.notes: dairy-free chocolate chips or chopped dairy-free chocolate

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: used for thickening the mother sauce base

instructions: Line a baking tray with parchment paper or a silicone mat.
Remove the Oreo cream biscuits from the package and place them on the prepared baking tray, leaving about 1 inch (2.5 cm) of space between each biscuit.
Bake the biscuits in the preheated oven for 5 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
While the biscuits are baking, prepare the mother sauce base by melting the almond milk, vanilla extract, and unsalted butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Once the biscuits have finished baking, remove them from the oven and let them cool for 2 minutes before transferring them to a serving dish or individual ramekins.
Pour the mother sauce base over the cooled biscuits and top with dark chocolate chips.
Place the dish or ramekins in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to set.
Before serving, sprinkle the mother sauce base with a pinch of flour to thicken the sauce, if desired.
